data_window: 2026-06-19T00:00:00Z to 2026-06-22T02:18:00Z; GitHub Search API for newly created or recently pushed AI repositories, plus README/root-content spot checks.
source_summary: GitHub Search API repository metadata; GitHub repository, README, and root contents API spot checks for selected candidates. No clone/install/runtime execution was performed.
trend_observations: Coding-agent products are moving toward governed delivery pipelines, merge queues, mobile/chat control channels, and proof receipts; MCP is shifting from standalone connectors toward local gateways, browser-control surfaces, shared memory, and security/policy proxies; self-hosted AI workbenches are packaging UI plus lightweight backend and provider routing.
assumptions: Prioritized repositories created or pushed in the last 24-72 hours with runnable UI/CLI/API evidence, README depth, examples/assets/Docker/CLI commands, and clear user workflow. Star counts are GitHub API snapshots, not time-series deltas. Repeated mature baselines from previous runs were excluded unless there was a fresh launch signal. Type-level exclusions are described in the report and not fabricated as skipped repositories.
markdown_report:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-22

数据窗口：2026-06-19T00:00:00Z to 2026-06-22T02:18:00Z; GitHub Search API for newly created or recently pushed AI repositories, plus README/root-content spot checks.

信息来源：GitHub Search API repository metadata; GitHub repository, README, and root contents API spot checks for selected candidates. No clone/install/runtime execution was performed.

## Top Projects

### 1. [umacloud/umadev](https://github.com/umacloud/umadev) - Coding Agent Governance - Score 88
- 做什么：A Rust project-director agent that wraps Claude Code, Codex, or OpenCode in a nine-stage governed delivery pipeline from requirement to quality gate and package.
- 面向谁：Teams using AI coding CLIs who need repeatable delivery process, artifacts, and governance around agent-written code.
- AI native 点：The product treats the coding agent as an execution substrate and adds process memory, stages, host specs, quality gates, and delivery artifacts around it.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 75 stars and 29 forks by the 2026-06-22 API snapshot; pushed 2026-06-22; README has multilingual docs, command references, specs, tests, npm folder, and website assets.
- 可运行性判断：Rust workspace with Cargo files, npm package directory, tests, specs, docs, .env example, and quick-experience instructions; not locally run in this audit.
- 建议动作：Try on a small Codex/Claude Code repo and evaluate whether the stage model produces useful PRD/architecture/QA artifacts without slowing iteration.

### 2. [Forward-Future/DeployBot](https://github.com/Forward-Future/DeployBot) - Agent Merge Queue / DevOps - Score 86
- 做什么：Provider-neutral GitHub merge queue for coding agents where Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, or MCP clients prepare PRs while humans keep final deploy authority.
- 面向谁：Engineering teams letting multiple AI coding agents prepare changes against the same repository.
- AI native 点：It converts agent output into authenticated GitHub labels/comments, reviewed heads, freeze windows, integration PRs, and failure pauses.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-20; 38 stars, 1 fork, 15 open issues; pushed 2026-06-22; README includes pip install, init policy, action.yml, examples, docs, tests, and MCP adapter references.
- 可运行性判断：Python package with pyproject, GitHub Action, examples, tests, policy template, and documented pip install from a pinned commit; not locally installed.
- 建议动作：Prototype on a low-risk repo where two agents open concurrent PRs; inspect policy ergonomics and failure rollback behavior.

### 3. [Francis1998/nexus-llm-router](https://github.com/Francis1998/nexus-llm-router) - LLM Gateway / Routing - Score 84
- 做什么：OpenAI-compatible multi-LLM routing middleware with task-aware model selection, cost optimization, fallback safety, and production controls.
- 面向谁：AI infrastructure engineers running multiple LLM providers behind one application API.
- AI native 点：Routing, fallback, cost policy, audit rationale, dashboards, and safety controls become first-class runtime behavior for LLM apps.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; 32 stars; pushed 2026-06-22; README shows tests passing badge and use-case GIF; root includes Dockerfile, docker-compose, deploy, migrations, dashboards, safety/security docs, tests.
- 可运行性判断：Python 3.11+ project with pyproject, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, Makefile, QUICKSTART, CONFIGURATION, SAFETY, dashboards, and tests; no live API run performed.
- 建议动作：Run docker-compose with two cheap providers or mocked endpoints; compare routing logs and fallback behavior against an existing LiteLLM/OpenRouter setup.

### 4. [HMDSimDev/heartmorrow](https://github.com/HMDSimDev/heartmorrow) - Local LLM Game / Consumer App - Score 83
- 做什么：Local-first LLM dating and world simulator with browser UI, local server, in-game phone, dates, gifts, minigames, calendar, saves, and OpenAI-compatible local model endpoints.
- 面向谁：Indie AI game builders and local-LLM users exploring persistent character simulation.
- AI native 点：The core gameplay loop is streamed in-character dialogue and relationship/world-state evolution driven by a local LLM endpoint.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-20; 53 stars and 4 forks; pushed 2026-06-21; README includes screenshots, run scripts, no-model fallback, local privacy positioning, and monorepo apps/packages.
- 可运行性判断：TypeScript pnpm workspace with apps, packages, docs, run.sh/run.bat, .env example, package.json, and local server architecture; no local run audit.
- 建议动作：Run with an Ollama or LM Studio OpenAI-compatible endpoint and study save-state schema plus character/world prompt architecture.

### 5. [tianjiangqiji/nova-image-studio](https://github.com/tianjiangqiji/nova-image-studio) - AI Image Workbench - Score 82
- 做什么：Self-hosted AI image-generation workbench with custom models, multi-mode UI, PWA, real-time task backend, agent/workbench modes, canvas, prompt reverse, prompt gallery, and GIF generation.
- 面向谁：Creators or small teams wanting a configurable image-generation studio rather than a single hosted model UI.
- AI native 点：It packages provider/model routing, task queueing, image workflows, prompt operations, and responsive UI into a product-shaped studio.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-21; 46 stars and 12 forks; pushed 2026-06-21; README is detailed in Chinese; root has frontend, backend, scripts, package files, and docs.
- 可运行性判断：Next.js/React frontend plus lightweight Node backend with SQLite/WebSocket per README; package.json, backend, frontend, scripts present; not locally started.
- 建议动作：Compare against ComfyUI/Invoke-like workflows for lightweight hosted image ops; test PWA export and backend queue behavior.

### 6. [ParendumOU/Nexora](https://github.com/ParendumOU/Nexora) - Self-hosted Multi-agent Workspace - Score 81
- 做什么：MIT self-hosted multi-tenant AI-agent orchestration platform with personas, skills/tools, delegation, RAG, semantic memory, marketplace, provider routing, FastAPI backend and Next.js frontend.
- 面向谁：Builders who want a self-hosted agent workspace with chat, tools, memory, and provider choice.
- AI native 点：The workspace model centers on configurable agents that chat, call tools, delegate to sub-agents, use RAG/memory, and stream results across many providers.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 14 stars; pushed 2026-06-21; companion mobile app also launched; README/root show docker-compose, backend/frontend, nginx, setup, Makefile, security docs.
- 可运行性判断：Docker Compose files for full/dev/data stacks, .env example, backend/frontend directories, Makefile and SETUP.md; no local deployment audit.
- 建议动作：Keep on watch and run once if docs remain coherent; evaluate if it has real marketplace/tool depth beyond scaffold breadth.

### 7. [tsouth89/conduit](https://github.com/tsouth89/conduit) - MCP Gateway / Desktop Manager - Score 78
- 做什么：Local MCP gateway and manager that lets users configure MCP servers once and expose them across Claude, Cursor, VS Code, Codex and other AI tools, with OS keychain storage.
- 面向谁：Developers juggling many MCP servers across multiple AI coding tools.
- AI native 点：It productizes MCP server management into a local desktop gateway with activity, playground, screenshots/demo, and cross-client connection model.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 6 stars, 2 forks, 7 open issues; pushed 2026-06-22; README has demo GIF/screenshots; root has Tauri Rust app, Vite/React frontend, docs, scripts.
- 可运行性判断：Tauri/Vite project with src-tauri, package.json, docs, screenshots and demo; early traction but strong product surface; no local desktop build.
- 建议动作：Watch closely; test once releases or install docs stabilize because MCP management pain is recurring across this radar.

### 8. [dondai1234/agent-browser](https://github.com/dondai1234/agent-browser) - Browser Automation MCP - Score 76
- 做什么：Token-efficient browser automation MCP server implemented as one Go binary over chromedp, emphasizing delta snapshots and no Playwright/Node dependency.
- 面向谁：Agent builders who need browser control with lower dependency and token overhead.
- AI native 点：The browser is exposed as an MCP-native tool surface tuned for agent observation/action loops, snapshots, stealth, and command efficiency.
- 增长/活跃信号：Created 2026-06-19; 10 stars, 2 forks; pushed 2026-06-21; README has hero/flow assets and MCP positioning; root includes cmd, internal, examples, docs, Go module and CI.
- 可运行性判断：Go module with cmd/internal/examples/docs and CI badge; no binary build or browser session test performed.
- 建议动作：Benchmark against Playwright MCP on observation token size, page-delta quality, and failure recovery on a few dynamic websites.

## Watchlist

- [AtharvaMaik/donecheck](https://github.com/AtharvaMaik/donecheck) - Agent Verification CLI - Score 73：Proof-of-done gate that runs verification commands and writes DONECHECK receipts for AI coding work. 建议：Try as a cheap guardrail in one automation repo.
- [artickc/kiro-telegram-bot](https://github.com/artickc/kiro-telegram-bot) - Mobile Coding Agent Control - Score 72：Telegram bridge for controlling Kiro CLI over Agent Client Protocol with live sessions and queued follow-ups. 建议：Watch ACP adoption and test only if Kiro CLI is part of the workflow.
- [pranjalbhatia710/descartes-mcp](https://github.com/pranjalbhatia710/descartes-mcp) - Planning Critique MCP - Score 71：MCP server that recursively questions plan decisions and grounds them in evidence or user input. 建议：Evaluate as a pre-flight planning tool; avoid overfitting until real workflow examples appear.
- [albertofettucini/Engram](https://github.com/albertofettucini/Engram) - Local AI Memory MCP - Score 70：Native macOS local-first shared memory layer for AI assistants via MCP. 建议：Watch for signed release UX and import/export reliability.
- [TerryCM/vibegroup](https://github.com/TerryCM/vibegroup) - Agent Coordination MCP - Score 69：End-to-end encrypted channel for Claude Code sessions to communicate across repos, machines and networks. 建议：Watch for practical multi-agent case studies before adopting.
- [elghaied/payload-eve-chat](https://github.com/elghaied/payload-eve-chat) - CMS-native AI Agent Starter - Score 68：Payload CMS admin chat agent using Eve, Vercel AI SDK/Gateway, MCP tools, optional voice, Docker and tests. 建议：Good starter for content ops demos; verify dependency on hosted Vercel services.

## Skip Reasons

- [renatogroffe/observabilidade-foundry-build-localhost-sp-2026](https://github.com/renatogroffe/observabilidade-foundry-build-localhost-sp-2026)：Presentation/slides repository around Microsoft Foundry observability; useful content but not a runnable product surface.
- [charlie12345/ROCmFPX](https://github.com/charlie12345/ROCmFPX)：Hardware/quantization-focused code with unclear product workflow for AI-native applications.
- [w512/AI-Vault](https://github.com/w512/AI-Vault)：Curated resource vault; explicitly valuable as learning material but excluded by prompt-collection/resource-list rule.
- [Xiaochengzi2048/find-a-book-mcp](https://github.com/Xiaochengzi2048/find-a-book-mcp)：Narrow MCP for Library Genesis search/download; legal/compliance ambiguity and limited product surface for this radar.
- [dikurdikur/palmier-pro-windows](https://github.com/dikurdikur/palmier-pro-windows)：Description/topics look keyword-stuffed and inconsistent; insufficient trust signal despite high star count.
- [scottstts/Threejs-Awesome-Graphics-Agent-Skills](https://github.com/scottstts/Threejs-Awesome-Graphics-Agent-Skills)：Agent skill collection for graphics prompts/workflows; closer to skill/prompt assets than a runnable AI product.

## 今日趋势观察

Coding-agent products are moving toward governed delivery pipelines, merge queues, mobile/chat control channels, and proof receipts; MCP is shifting from standalone connectors toward local gateways, browser-control surfaces, shared memory, and security/policy proxies; self-hosted AI workbenches are packaging UI plus lightweight backend and provider routing.

## 类型级降权说明

今天继续降权纯资源清单、论文/训练代码、模型量化包、只有 README 的概念仓库、单一 SDK wrapper、明显关键词堆砌仓库，以及没有安装/运行/示例路径的早期 MCP 小工具。这些只作为筛选假设写入，不伪造成 skipped_projects。

## 关键假设

Prioritized repositories created or pushed in the last 24-72 hours with runnable UI/CLI/API evidence, README depth, examples/assets/Docker/CLI commands, and clear user workflow. Star counts are GitHub API snapshots, not time-series deltas. Repeated mature baselines from previous runs were excluded unless there was a fresh launch signal. Type-level exclusions are described in the report and not fabricated as skipped repositories.

## 实时仓库审计说明

已做 GitHub Search API 元数据抓取，并对 Top/Watchlist 候选做 GitHub README 与根目录 API 抽查；未 clone、未安装依赖、未运行 Docker/npm/pip/go/cargo，也未验证 demo 服务。
